calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-23-2023 Continued To May-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jun-11-2014 is admitted to probate. Timothy R. Esposto and Andrew L. Esposto are appointed Co-Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-23-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
